card.title: Food Sensitivity
card.description: Identify the foods that may be contributing to inflammation, bloating, or discomfort. By analyzing your body's immune response to 96 foods, you'll gain a personalized roadmap to a healthier, happier diet.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

quotes.quote: “This is the most convenient way to get labs. I am super excited about this. Now, in the convenience of your own home, you can do your own blood work. You can order this At-Home Test Kit and draw your own blood just by pricking your finger. They include a return envelope here. Pop it in your mailbox, and you will get labs back so you can see your biomarkers.”
quotes.author: Eric Hinman

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: Do I have to eliminate foods that test moderate or high forever?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: Best ways to get blood for a finger prick?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: How can a food sensitivity test be helpful?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

ingredients.heading: Measuring your body’s immune response to 96 foods
ingredients.description: This test detects IgG antibody levels in response to 96 foods, including dairy, meat, grains, and more, providing valuable insights to help you personalize your diet for optimal health and well-being.
